// 	VerificationContracts
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Contrats (ports) de la slice Verification.
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/// <summary>Plage de dates de trade traitée par un run (fromTradeDate / toTradeDate).</summary>
/// <param name="FromTradeDate">Date de trade de début (incluse).</param>
/// <param name="ToTradeDate">Date de trade de fin (incluse).</param>
public sealed record VerificationDateRange(DateOnly FromTradeDate, DateOnly ToTradeDate);

/// <summary>Source des transactions CBP (ResultSet A) — API REST CBP.</summary>
public interface ICbpTransactionSource
{
    /// <exception cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException">Source indisponible ou réponse en erreur (« API down »).</exception>
    Task<IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>Source des transactions FXSentry (ResultSet B) — vue SQL Server integrite.CBP_V_INTEGRITE_F_FRONTOFFICE.</summary>
public interface IFxSentryTransactionSource
{
    /// <exception cref="TransactionSourceUnavailableException">Source indisponible (base/vue inaccessible).</exception>
    Task<IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction>> GetTransactionsAsync(VerificationDateRange range, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>Persistance des résultats (run + anomalies).</summary>
public interface IVerificationStore
{
    Task SaveRunAsync(VerificationRun run, CancellationToken cancellationToken);

    Task AddAnomaliesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>
/// Suivi des transactions déjà récupérées par date métier — base du mode
/// <see cref="VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante"/> (ne traiter que le delta du jour).
/// La clé est le transId CBP (== CUST_REF FXSentry).
/// </summary>
public interface IRetrievedTransactionStore
{
    /// <summary>Clés déjà enregistrées comme récupérées pour cette date métier.</summary>
    Task<IReadOnlySet<string>> GetRetrievedKeysAsync(DateOnly businessDate, CancellationToken cancellationToken);

    /// <summary>Enregistre les clés traitées pour cette date métier (idempotent).</summary>
    Task RecordRetrievedAsync(DateOnly businessDate, IReadOnlyCollection<string> transactionKeys, DateTimeOffset retrievedAt, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>Notification du Back-Office si au moins une anomalie.</summary>
public interface INotifier
{
    Task NotifyAsync(VerificationRun run, CancellationToken cancellationToken);
}

/// <summary>
/// Levée par une source lorsqu'elle est indisponible (cas « ex. API down »).
/// Interceptée par le handler pour clôturer le run en échec proprement.
/// </summary>
public sealed class TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource source, string message, Exception? innerException = null)
    : Exception(message, innerException)
{
    public TransactionSource FailedSource { get; } = source;
}

// End 	VerificationContracts


// RetrievedTransactionStore
using Dapper;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>
/// Persistance Dapper du suivi des transactions récupérées (table integrite.CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT).
/// Sert au mode <see cref="VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante"/> : exclure le déjà-traité du jour.
/// </summary>
public sealed class RetrievedTransactionStore(IAppDbConnectionFactory connectionFactory, ILogger<RetrievedTransactionStore> logger) : IRetrievedTransactionStore
{
    private const string SelectKeysSql =
        "SELECT TransactionKey FROM integrite.CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT WHERE BusinessDate = @BusinessDate;";

    private const string InsertKeySql =
        """
        INSERT INTO integrite.CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT (BusinessDate, TransactionKey, RetrievedAt)
        VALUES (@BusinessDate, @TransactionKey, @RetrievedAt);
        """;

    public async Task<IReadOnlySet<string>> GetRetrievedKeysAsync(DateOnly businessDate, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();
        var keys = await connection.QueryAsync<string>(
            new CommandDefinition(SelectKeysSql, new { BusinessDate = businessDate }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));
        return keys.ToHashSet(StringComparer.Ordinal);
    }

    public async Task RecordRetrievedAsync(DateOnly businessDate, IReadOnlyCollection<string> transactionKeys, DateTimeOffset retrievedAt, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(transactionKeys);
        if (transactionKeys.Count == 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        using var connection = connectionFactory.Create();

        // Idempotence portable (SQL Server + SQLite) : on insère uniquement les clés pas déjà tracées
        // ce jour (la PK composite BusinessDate+TransactionKey reste le garde-fou ultime).
        var existing = (await connection.QueryAsync<string>(
            new CommandDefinition(SelectKeysSql, new { BusinessDate = businessDate }, cancellationToken: cancellationToken)))
            .ToHashSet(StringComparer.Ordinal);

        var rows = transactionKeys
            .Where(key => !existing.Contains(key))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select(key => new { BusinessDate = businessDate, TransactionKey = key, RetrievedAt = retrievedAt })
            .ToArray();
        if (rows.Length == 0)
        {
            return;
        }

        await connection.ExecuteAsync(new CommandDefinition(InsertKeySql, rows, cancellationToken: cancellationToken));
        logger.LogDebug("{Count} clé(s) de transaction tracée(s) pour {BusinessDate}.", rows.Length, businessDate);
    }
}

// end RetrievedTransactionStore


//	0003_create_retrieved_transactions.sql
-- =============================================================================
-- IntegriteCBPFX — suivi des transactions récupérées par jour (schéma integrite).
--
-- À exécuter par les DBA sur la base **unique** APRÈS le script 0000 (schéma « integrite »).
-- Alimente le mode « FinJourneeCourante » : ne traiter que les transactions du jour non
-- encore récupérées (delta vs les runs précédents). Tous les runs y enregistrent les clés
-- traitées (TransactionKey = transId CBP == CUST_REF FXSentry), par BusinessDate.
-- Idempotent (réexécutable sans erreur).
-- =============================================================================

IF OBJECT_ID(N'integrite.CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT', N'U') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT
    (
        BusinessDate   date           NOT NULL,
        TransactionKey nvarchar(100)  NOT NULL,
        RetrievedAt    datetimeoffset NOT NULL,
        CONSTRAINT PK_CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT PRIMARY KEY (BusinessDate, TransactionKey)
    );
END
GO

// end 	0003_create_retrieved_transactions.sql 


// 	RetrievedTransactionStoreTests.cs 
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Common.Persistence;

/// <summary>Suivi des transactions récupérées (RetrievedTransactionStore) sur SQLite — round-trip et idempotence.</summary>
public sealed class RetrievedTransactionStoreTests : IDisposable
{
    private static readonly DateTimeOffset Now = new(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);
    private static readonly DateOnly Day = new(2026, 6, 15);

    private readonly SqliteIntegriteDatabase _db = new();
    private readonly RetrievedTransactionStore _store;

    public RetrievedTransactionStoreTests()
        => _store = new RetrievedTransactionStore(_db, NullLogger<RetrievedTransactionStore>.Instance);

    public void Dispose() => _db.Dispose();

    [Fact]
    public async Task Records_Then_Returns_Keys_For_The_Day()
    {
        await _store.RecordRetrievedAsync(Day, ["T1", "T2"], Now, CancellationToken.None);

        var keys = await _store.GetRetrievedKeysAsync(Day, CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(["T1", "T2"], keys.OrderBy(k => k, StringComparer.Ordinal));
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Record_Is_Idempotent()
    {
        await _store.RecordRetrievedAsync(Day, ["T1"], Now, CancellationToken.None);
        await _store.RecordRetrievedAsync(Day, ["T1", "T2"], Now, CancellationToken.None);   // T1 déjà présent

        var keys = await _store.GetRetrievedKeysAsync(Day, CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Equal(["T1", "T2"], keys.OrderBy(k => k, StringComparer.Ordinal));
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Keys_Are_Scoped_By_BusinessDate()
    {
        await _store.RecordRetrievedAsync(Day, ["T1"], Now, CancellationToken.None);

        var otherDay = await _store.GetRetrievedKeysAsync(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 16), CancellationToken.None);

        Assert.Empty(otherDay);
    }
}

// End 	RetrievedTransactionStoreTests.cs 

// RunVerification.cs
using System.Diagnostics;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Abstractions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;

/// <summary>Mode d'exécution déterminant la plage de dates de trade à traiter.</summary>
public enum VerificationMode
{
    /// <summary>Veille : fromTradeDate = J-1, toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    Veille,

    /// <summary>Journée courante : fromTradeDate = toTradeDate = jour courant.</summary>
    JourneeCourante,

    /// <summary>
    /// Fin de journée courante : même plage que <see cref="JourneeCourante"/> (J..J), mais ne
    /// traite QUE les transactions non encore récupérées ce jour (delta vs les runs précédents).
    /// </summary>
    FinJourneeCourante,
}

/// <summary>Commande : lancer la vérification d'intégrité pour un mode donné.</summary>
/// <remarks>Le jour « J » découle de <c>IClock.Current</c> ; un rejeu d'une date passée se fait en
/// substituant l'horloge (<c>FixedDateClock</c>), qui fige <c>Current</c> sans toucher à l'audit.</remarks>
public sealed record RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode Mode);

/// <summary>Résultat synthétique du run, utilisé par le host pour le code de sortie.</summary>
public sealed record RunVerificationResult
{
    public required Guid RunId { get; init; }
    public required VerificationStatus Status { get; init; }
    public int CbpTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int FxTransactionCount { get; init; }
    public int AnomalyCount { get; init; }
    public string? FailureReason { get; init; }

    public bool Succeeded => Status == VerificationStatus.Completed;
    public bool HasAnomalies => AnomalyCount > 0;

    public static RunVerificationResult FromRun(VerificationRun run) => new()
    {
        RunId = run.Id,
        Status = run.Status,
        CbpTransactionCount = run.CbpTransactionCount,
        FxTransactionCount = run.FxTransactionCount,
        AnomalyCount = run.AnomalyCount,
        FailureReason = run.FailureReason,
    };
}

/// <summary>
/// Use-case central : extrait CBP + FXSentry pour la plage du mode, délègue le
/// rapprochement au <see cref="VerificationEngine"/>, persiste, et notifie en cas d'anomalies.
/// </summary>
public sealed class RunVerificationHandler(
    ICbpTransactionSource cbpSource,
    IFxSentryTransactionSource fxSource,
    VerificationEngine engine,
    IVerificationStore store,
    IRetrievedTransactionStore retrievedStore,
    INotifier notifier,
    IClock clock,
    ILogger<RunVerificationHandler> logger)
{
    public async Task<RunVerificationResult> HandleAsync(RunVerificationCommand command, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(command);

        // Jour « J » = date de l'horloge (clock.Current) — en rejeu, FixedDateClock la fige.
        // Les horodatages d'audit (StartedAt/CompletedAt/DateCreationErreur) viennent de
        // clock.CurrentAuditTime : date+heure réelles (fuseau local), indépendantes de la date métier.
        var today = DateOnly.FromDateTime(clock.Current.Date);
        var range = ResolveRange(command.Mode, today);

        var run = VerificationRun.Start(Guid.NewGuid(), range.ToTradeDate, clock.CurrentAuditTime);
        var stopwatch = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        using var scope = logger.BeginScope("Run {RunId} - {Mode} [{From}..{To}]", run.Id, command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate);
        logger.LogInformation(
            "Démarrage de la vérification — mode {Mode}, tradeDate {From}..{To} (run {RunId}).",
            command.Mode, range.FromTradeDate, range.ToTradeDate, run.Id);

        IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction> cbpTransactions;
        IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction> fxTransactions;
        try
        {
            cbpTransactions = await cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("CBP : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", cbpTransactions.Count);

            fxTransactions = await fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(range, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("FXSentry : {Count} transaction(s) extraite(s).", fxTransactions.Count);
        }
        catch (TransactionSourceUnavailableException ex)
        {
            run.Fail(clock.CurrentAuditTime, $"Source {ex.FailedSource} indisponible : {ex.Message}");
            await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogError(ex, "Source {Source} indisponible — run {RunId} en échec après {Elapsed}.", ex.FailedSource, run.Id, stopwatch.Elapsed);
            return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
        }

        // FinJourneeCourante : ne garder que les transactions du jour pas encore récupérées.
        if (command.Mode == VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante)
        {
            var alreadyRetrieved = await retrievedStore.GetRetrievedKeysAsync(range.ToTradeDate, cancellationToken);
            if (alreadyRetrieved.Count > 0)
            {
                cbpTransactions = cbpTransactions.Where(c => !alreadyRetrieved.Contains(c.TransId)).ToArray();
                fxTransactions = fxTransactions.Where(f => !alreadyRetrieved.Contains(f.CustRef)).ToArray();
                logger.LogInformation(
                    "FinJourneeCourante : {Excluded} transaction(s) déjà récupérée(s) exclue(s) ; reste CBP={Cbp}, FX={Fx}.",
                    alreadyRetrieved.Count, cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count);
            }
        }

        var anomalies = engine.Verify(cbpTransactions, fxTransactions, clock.CurrentAuditTime);

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Rapprochement : {Total} anomalie(s) — Tx CBP absentes FX={CbpMissing}, Tx FX absentes CBP={FxMissing}, écarts champs={FieldDiffs}.",
            anomalies.Count,
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.CbpNotInFxSentry),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FxSentryNotInCbp),
            anomalies.Count(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences));

        LogTopFieldsInError(anomalies);

        await store.AddAnomaliesAsync(anomalies, cancellationToken);
        run.Complete(clock.CurrentAuditTime, cbpTransactions.Count, fxTransactions.Count, anomalies.Count);
        await store.SaveRunAsync(run, cancellationToken);

        // Trace les clés traitées (transId/CUST_REF) pour permettre le delta d'un FinJourneeCourante ultérieur.
        var processedKeys = cbpTransactions.Select(c => c.TransId)
            .Concat(fxTransactions.Select(f => f.CustRef))
            .Distinct(StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .ToArray();
        await retrievedStore.RecordRetrievedAsync(range.ToTradeDate, processedKeys, clock.CurrentAuditTime, cancellationToken);

        if (anomalies.Count > 0)
        {
            await notifier.NotifyAsync(run, cancellationToken);
            logger.LogInformation("Back-Office notifié ({Count} anomalie(s)).", anomalies.Count);
        }

        logger.LogInformation(
            "Vérification terminée — statut {Status}, {AnomalyCount} anomalie(s), durée {Elapsed}.",
            run.Status, anomalies.Count, stopwatch.Elapsed);

        return RunVerificationResult.FromRun(run);
    }

    /// <summary>Journalise les 5 champs les plus fréquemment en écart (anomalies de code 3).</summary>
    private void LogTopFieldsInError(IReadOnlyList<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies)
    {
        var topFields = TopFieldsInError(anomalies);
        if (topFields.Count > 0)
        {
            logger.LogInformation("Top champs en écart : {TopFields}.", string.Join(", ", topFields));
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Les (au plus) 5 champs les plus fréquemment en écart parmi les anomalies de code 3,
    /// au format « champ=compte », triés par compte décroissant puis nom (ordinal).
    /// </summary>
    public static IReadOnlyList<string> TopFieldsInError(IReadOnlyList<AnomalyTransaction> anomalies)
    {
        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(anomalies);
        return anomalies
            .Where(a => a.CodeErreur == AnomalyCode.FieldDifferences && a.ChampsErreurs is not null)
            .SelectMany(a => a.ChampsErreurs!.Split(AnomalyTransaction.SeparateurChamps, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries | StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries))
            .GroupBy(field => field, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .OrderByDescending(group => group.Count())
            .ThenBy(group => group.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Take(5)
            .Select(group => $"{group.Key}={group.Count()}")
            .ToArray();
    }

    /// <summary>Résout la plage de dates de trade selon le mode.</summary>
    public static VerificationDateRange ResolveRange(VerificationMode mode, DateOnly today) => mode switch
    {
        VerificationMode.Veille => new VerificationDateRange(today.AddDays(-1), today),
        VerificationMode.JourneeCourante or VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante => new VerificationDateRange(today, today),
        _ => throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(mode)),
    };
}

//END RunVerification

//VerificationModule
  enregistrement DI IRetrievedTransactionStore → RetrievedTransactionStore

//End VerificationModule


// SqliteIntegriteDatabase
using System.Data.Common;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Common.Persistence;
using Microsoft.Data.Sqlite;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;

/// <summary>
/// Base SQLite (fichiers temporaires) exposant un schéma « integrite » via ATTACH, pour
/// tester les requêtes Dapper qualifiées <c>integrite.CBP_*</c> comme en SQL Server.
/// Implémente <see cref="IAppDbConnectionFactory"/> : injectable dans le store.
/// Pooling désactivé → chaque connexion ré-attache proprement et se ferme.
/// </summary>
public sealed class SqliteIntegriteDatabase : IAppDbConnectionFactory, IDisposable
{
    private readonly string _mainPath = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), $"integ_{Guid.NewGuid():N}.db");
    private readonly string _integritePath = Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), $"integrite_{Guid.NewGuid():N}.db");

    public SqliteIntegriteDatabase()
    {
        using var connection = OpenWithIntegriteSchema();
        using var command = connection.CreateCommand();
        command.CommandText =
            """
            CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_AnomalyTransaction_FACT (
                Id                    TEXT    NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
                DateCreationErreur    TEXT    NOT NULL,
                IdCBPTransaction      TEXT    NULL,
                IdFxSentryTransaction TEXT    NULL,
                CodeErreur            TEXT    NOT NULL,
                DescriptionErreur     TEXT    NOT NULL,
                ChampsErreurs         TEXT    NULL
            );
            CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_VerificationRun_FACT (
                Id                  TEXT    NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
                BusinessDate        TEXT    NOT NULL,
                Status              TEXT    NOT NULL,
                StartedAt           TEXT    NOT NULL,
                CompletedAt         TEXT    NULL,
                CbpTransactionCount INTEGER NOT NULL,
                FxTransactionCount  INTEGER NOT NULL,
                AnomalyCount        INTEGER NOT NULL,
                FailureReason       TEXT    NULL
            );
            CREATE TABLE integrite.CBP_RetrievedTransaction_FACT (
                BusinessDate   TEXT NOT NULL,
                TransactionKey TEXT NOT NULL,
                RetrievedAt    TEXT NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (BusinessDate, TransactionKey)
            );
            """;
        command.ExecuteNonQuery();
    }

    public DbConnection Create() => OpenWithIntegriteSchema();

    private SqliteConnection OpenWithIntegriteSchema()
    {
        var connection = new SqliteConnection($"Data Source={_mainPath};Pooling=False");
        connection.Open();
        using var attach = connection.CreateCommand();
        attach.CommandText = $"ATTACH DATABASE '{_integritePath.Replace('\\', '/')}' AS integrite;";
        attach.ExecuteNonQuery();
        return connection;
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        TryDelete(_mainPath);
        TryDelete(_integritePath);

        static void TryDelete(string path)
        {
            try
            {
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    File.Delete(path);
                }
            }
            catch (IOException)
            {
                // Fichier temporaire encore verrouillé : sans gravité pour les tests.
            }
        }
    }
}

//End SqliteIntegriteDatabase



//RunVerificationHandlerTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Anomalies;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Comparison;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Transactions;
using IntegriteCBPFX.SharedKernel.Verification;
using IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.TestSupport;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions;
using NSubstitute;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests.Features.Verification;

public sealed class RunVerificationHandlerTests
{
    private readonly ICbpTransactionSource _cbpSource = Substitute.For<ICbpTransactionSource>();
    private readonly IFxSentryTransactionSource _fxSource = Substitute.For<IFxSentryTransactionSource>();
    private readonly IVerificationStore _store = Substitute.For<IVerificationStore>();
    private readonly IRetrievedTransactionStore _retrievedStore = Substitute.For<IRetrievedTransactionStore>();
    private readonly INotifier _notifier = Substitute.For<INotifier>();
    // Current (UTC) pilote « J » par défaut ; CurrentAuditTime (distinct, local) pilote l'audit.
    private readonly FixedClock _clock = new(
        new DateTimeOffset(2026, 5, 4, 8, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero),
        auditTime: new DateTimeOffset(2026, 7, 20, 14, 30, 0, TimeSpan.FromHours(2)));

    public RunVerificationHandlerTests()
        // Par défaut : aucune transaction déjà récupérée (le filtre FinJourneeCourante ne retire rien).
        => _retrievedStore.GetRetrievedKeysAsync(Arg.Any<DateOnly>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>())
            .Returns(new HashSet<string>());

    private RunVerificationHandler CreateHandler() => new(
        _cbpSource,
        _fxSource,
        new VerificationEngine(new TransactionComparer()),
        _store,
        _retrievedStore,
        _notifier,
        _clock,
        NullLogger<RunVerificationHandler>.Instance);

    private void GivenSources(IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction> cbp, IReadOnlyCollection<FxSentryTransaction> fx)
    {
        _cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationDateRange>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns(cbp);
        _fxSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationDateRange>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>()).Returns(fx);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData(VerificationMode.Veille, "2026-05-03", "2026-05-04")]
    [InlineData(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante, "2026-05-04", "2026-05-04")]
    [InlineData(VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante, "2026-05-04", "2026-05-04")]
    public void ResolveRange_Maps_Mode_To_Trade_Date_Range(VerificationMode mode, string from, string to)
    {
        // Arrange
        var today = new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4);

        // Act
        var range = RunVerificationHandler.ResolveRange(mode, today);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(DateOnly.Parse(from), range.FromTradeDate);
        Assert.Equal(DateOnly.Parse(to), range.ToTradeDate);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void ResolveRange_Throws_On_Unknown_Mode()
    {
        Assert.Throws<ArgumentOutOfRangeException>(
            () => RunVerificationHandler.ResolveRange((VerificationMode)999, new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4)));
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TopFieldsInError_Ranks_By_Frequency_Then_Name()
    {
        // Arrange — 'status' 3×, 'tradeRate' 1×, 'valueDate' 1× ; le code 1 est ignoré.
        var now = new DateTimeOffset(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);
        var anomalies = new[]
        {
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("c1", "f1", ["status", "tradeRate"], now),
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("c2", "f2", ["status", "valueDate"], now),
            AnomalyTransaction.FieldDifferences("c3", "f3", ["status"], now),
            AnomalyTransaction.CbpNotInFxSentry("c4", now),
        };

        // Act
        var top = RunVerificationHandler.TopFieldsInError(anomalies);

        // Assert — compte décroissant, puis nom (égalité tradeRate/valueDate → ordre alphabétique).
        Assert.Equal(["status=3", "tradeRate=1", "valueDate=1"], top);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void TopFieldsInError_Empty_When_No_Field_Difference()
    {
        var now = new DateTimeOffset(2026, 6, 15, 22, 0, 0, TimeSpan.Zero);

        var top = RunVerificationHandler.TopFieldsInError([AnomalyTransaction.CbpNotInFxSentry("c1", now)]);

        Assert.Empty(top);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Uses_Current_For_Range_But_CurrentAuditTime_For_Audit()
    {
        // Arrange — Current = 2026-05-04 (UTC), CurrentAuditTime = 2026-07-20 (distinct).
        GivenSources([], []);

        // Act — JourneeCourante => plage = jour de Current.
        await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert — plage/BusinessDate suivent Current…
        await _cbpSource.Received(1).GetTransactionsAsync(
            Arg.Is<VerificationDateRange>(r => r.FromTradeDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4) && r.ToTradeDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4)),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        // …mais l'horodatage d'audit vient de CurrentAuditTime (≠ Current).
        await _store.Received(1).SaveRunAsync(
            Arg.Is<VerificationRun>(r => r.BusinessDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4) && r.StartedAt == _clock.CurrentAuditTime),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Veille_Mode_Passes_J_Minus_1_To_J_To_Sources()
    {
        // Arrange
        GivenSources([], []);

        // Act
        await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        await _cbpSource.Received(1).GetTransactionsAsync(
            Arg.Is<VerificationDateRange>(r => r.FromTradeDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 3) && r.ToTradeDate == new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4)),
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_Source_Unavailable_Then_Run_Failed_And_Nothing_Persisted_Or_Notified()
    {
        // Arrange — la source CBP est indisponible.
        _cbpSource.GetTransactionsAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationDateRange>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>())
            .Returns<IReadOnlyCollection<CbpTransaction>>(_ => throw new TransactionSourceUnavailableException(TransactionSource.Cbp, "API down"));

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Failed, result.Status);
        await _store.Received(1).SaveRunAsync(Arg.Is<VerificationRun>(r => r.Status == VerificationStatus.Failed), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _store.DidNotReceive().AddAnomaliesAsync(Arg.Any<IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction>>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _notifier.DidNotReceive().NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_Anomalies_Then_Persisted_And_BackOffice_Notified()
    {
        // Arrange — CBP sans contrepartie FX => 1 anomalie (code 1).
        GivenSources([TransactionTestData.Cbp()], []);

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(1, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _store.Received(1).AddAnomaliesAsync(Arg.Is<IReadOnlyCollection<AnomalyTransaction>>(a => a.Count == 1), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
        await _notifier.Received(1).NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task When_No_Anomaly_Then_No_Notification()
    {
        // Arrange — paire concordante => 0 anomalie.
        GivenSources([TransactionTestData.Cbp()], [TransactionTestData.Fx()]);

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.Veille), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(0, result.AnomalyCount);
        await _notifier.DidNotReceive().NotifyAsync(Arg.Any<VerificationRun>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task FinJourneeCourante_Excludes_Already_Retrieved_Transactions()
    {
        // Arrange — CBP « T1 » sans FX (donnerait 1 anomalie), mais T1 est déjà récupéré ce jour.
        GivenSources([TransactionTestData.Cbp()], []);
        _retrievedStore.GetRetrievedKeysAsync(Arg.Any<DateOnly>(), Arg.Any<CancellationToken>())
            .Returns(new HashSet<string> { "T1" });

        // Act
        var result = await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(
            new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert — T1 exclu => rien à traiter, aucune anomalie.
        Assert.Equal(VerificationStatus.Completed, result.Status);
        Assert.Equal(0, result.CbpTransactionCount);
        Assert.Equal(0, result.AnomalyCount);
    }

    [Fact]
    public async Task Records_Processed_Transaction_Keys_For_BusinessDate()
    {
        // Arrange — paire concordante (clé T1).
        GivenSources([TransactionTestData.Cbp()], [TransactionTestData.Fx()]);

        // Act
        await CreateHandler().HandleAsync(new RunVerificationCommand(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante), CancellationToken.None);

        // Assert — la clé traitée est tracée pour la BusinessDate (jour de Current), à l'heure d'audit.
        await _retrievedStore.Received(1).RecordRetrievedAsync(
            new DateOnly(2026, 5, 4),
            Arg.Is<IReadOnlyCollection<string>>(keys => keys.Contains("T1")),
            _clock.CurrentAuditTime,
            Arg.Any<CancellationToken>());
    }
}

//End RunVerificationHandlerTests


//VerificationArgsTests
using IntegriteCBPFX.App;
using IntegriteCBPFX.App.Features.Verification;
using Xunit;

namespace IntegriteCBPFX.Tests;

/// <summary>Analyse des arguments de ligne de commande (mode + date d'exécution optionnelle).</summary>
public sealed class VerificationArgsTests
{
    [Fact]
    public void No_Args_Defaults_To_Veille_Without_Date()
    {
        var cli = VerificationArgs.Parse([]);

        Assert.Equal(VerificationMode.Veille, cli.Mode);
        Assert.Null(cli.ExecutionDate);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("JourneeCourante")]
    [InlineData("journeecourante")]      // insensible à la casse
    [InlineData("--mode", "JourneeCourante")]
    [InlineData("--mode=JourneeCourante")]
    public void Parses_Mode_Positional_Or_Named(params string[] args)
    {
        var cli = VerificationArgs.Parse(args);

        Assert.Equal(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante, cli.Mode);
        Assert.Null(cli.ExecutionDate);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("20260615")]                  // positionnel
    [InlineData("--date", "20260615")]
    [InlineData("--date=20260615")]
    public void Parses_Execution_Date_Positional_Or_Named(params string[] args)
    {
        var cli = VerificationArgs.Parse(args);

        Assert.Equal(VerificationMode.Veille, cli.Mode);     // mode par défaut conservé
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), cli.ExecutionDate);
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("JourneeCourante", "20260615")]
    [InlineData("20260615", "JourneeCourante")]              // ordre indifférent
    [InlineData("--mode=JourneeCourante", "--date=20260615")]
    public void Parses_Mode_And_Date_Together(params string[] args)
    {
        var cli = VerificationArgs.Parse(args);

        Assert.Equal(VerificationMode.JourneeCourante, cli.Mode);
        Assert.Equal(new DateOnly(2026, 6, 15), cli.ExecutionDate);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Parses_FinJourneeCourante_Mode()
    {
        Assert.Equal(VerificationMode.FinJourneeCourante, VerificationArgs.Parse(["FinJourneeCourante"]).Mode);
    }

    [Fact]
    public void Invalid_Mode_Throws_FormatException()
    {
        Assert.Throws<FormatException>(() => VerificationArgs.Parse(["Hier"]));
    }

    [Theory]
    [InlineData("--date", "2026-06-15")]   // mauvais format (tirets)
    [InlineData("--date", "20260631")]     // 31 juin inexistant
    [InlineData("--date", "abcdefgh")]
    public void Invalid_Date_Throws_FormatException(params string[] args)
    {
        Assert.Throws<FormatException>(() => VerificationArgs.Parse(args));
    }
}

//End VerificationArgsTests
